tooltip.cobblesafari.creative_dungeon_po: Creative-only - Infinite portal that regenerate instead of disapearing.
While in creative, shift and right-click to change destination.
tooltip.cobblesafari.creative_flag: Creative only - permanently unlocks every secret base PC features and give unlimited battery
tooltip.cobblesafari.creative_egg: Creative only - right-click an incubator to grow it instantly
tooltip.cobblesafari.lucky_mining_helmet: Wearing this helmet brings good luck
tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_random_bal: A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.
Used on a Pokemon, it randomizes the ball it was caught in.
A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.
Used on a Pokemon, it randomizes all EVs.
tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_random_gen: A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.
Used on a Pokemon, it changes its gender.
A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.
Used on a Pokemon, it randomizes all IVs.)
tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_random_lev: A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.
Used on a Pokemon, it randomizes its level.)
tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_random_shi: A distorted crystal, made by Giratina using remnants of the Red Chain.
Used on a Pokemon, it rerolls shiny status.
tooltip.cobblesafari.redchain_fragment.l: This fragment seems to come both from the past and the future.
Bring it to Giratina's lair and it might reward you.
tooltip.cobblesafari.hyperberry_enigma.l: A strange berry, found in Hyperspace Luminose.
When fed to a Pokemon, it maximizes friendship and sets all EVs to 0.
tooltip.cobblesafari.hyperberry_tamato.l: A strange berry, found in Hyperspace Luminose.
When fed to a Pokemon, it sets Speed EVs to 252, resets friendship to 0, and counts as 3 feedings.
tooltip.cobblesafari.hyperberry_grepa.li: A strange berry, found in Hyperspace Luminose.
When fed to a Pokemon, it sets Sp. Defense EVs to 252, resets friendship to 0, and counts as 3 feedings.
tooltip.cobblesafari.hyperberry_hondew.l: A strange berry, found in Hyperspace Luminose.
When fed to a Pokemon, it sets Sp. Attack EVs to 252, resets friendship to 0, and counts as 3 feedings.

tooltip.cobblesafari.hyperberry_pomeg.li: A strange berry, found in Hyperspace Luminose.
When fed to a Pokemon, it sets HP EVs to 252, resets friendship to 0, and counts as 3 feedings.
tooltip.cobblesafari.hyperberry_salac.li: A strange berry, found in Hyperspace Luminose.
When fed to a Pokemon, it sets Speed IVs to 31, resets friendship to 0, and counts as 3 feedings.

tooltip.cobblesafari.donut.plain: A plain donut, without any flavor. Pokémons won't appreciate it, but you can still eat it.
tooltip.cobblesafari.donut.eat: Eat to apply rolled powers for a duration equal to its calories in seconds.
tooltip.cobblesafari.donut_dungeon_porta: A donut with a dark frosting and golden border, it makes you want to go on an adventure. Given to a Hoopa, it allows to create a portal to
tooltip.cobblesafari.donut_dungeon_paris: A grey donut with rainbow-colored icing, each bite feels like a dream. Given to a Hoopa, it allows to create a portal to
tooltip.cobblesafari.donut_dungeon_disto: A floral donut with an intense flavor that makes time and space seem to disappear for a moment. Given to a Hoopa, it allows to create a portal to
tooltip.cobblesafari.donut_dungeon_under: A sugary donut with crystallized sugar that melts on the tongue. Given to a Hoopa, it allows to create a portal to
tooltip.cobblesafari.ingredient_dungeon_: A powder that pulses with extra-dimensional energy. Can be used to make a very special donut.
A rainbow-colored icing that seems to come from a dream. Can be used to make a very special donut.
A flower that seems to originate from another world. Can be used to make a very special donut.
A cluster of rock candy, originating from the Sinnoh region. Can be used to make a very special donut.
